Localization.Description: A user assigned a role to a user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role "{object.new_value}" to the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} assigned the role "{object.new_value}" to the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
